notes: Foundational base-case file for the [1]=id isogeny identity, building up from division-polynomial rewrites to full Isogeny struct equality; also provides the uniqueness characterisation of (mulByInt W n).pullback (38-line proof) and substitution lemmas for Φ_ff/ΨSq_ff. No sorries, no maxHeartbeats overrides; five of the thirteen declarations have no callers within this file (all are public API consumed by MulByIntComp and other files).
